Title: Forecasting API returns incorrect values for leap years
Body: The /forecast endpoint fails to account for leap years, causing a one-day offset in projected inventory

Title: Add REST endpoint for Bulk SKU load
Body: Implement a POST /skus/bulk route to allow batch uploading of SKU data via .csv or .json

Title: Debounce input oon forecast parameter form
Body: Rapid changes in the forecasting form (e.g., lead time, demand variability) trigger excessive API calls.  Add debouncing to reduce load.

Title: Inventory adjustment fails when quantity is zero
Body: The  PUT /inventory/:id endpoint rejects payloads when quantity is zero, even though zero is a valid update in certain contexts.

Title: Display confidence levels on forecast chart
Body: Extend the chart.js to show upper and lower confidence bounds around the forecast lline.

Title: Add an option for naive forcast
Body: Give forecasters the option to, at a SKU level, predict that the forecast for the following month is the actual sales for the current month.

Title: Enhanced warnings
Body: Display an alert on the forecaster's browser if a manual override exceeds two standard deviatons.

Title: REST API doesn't return ETag for caching
Body: The GET /inventory/:id response should return ETag headers to support client-side caching and If-None-Match validation.

Title: Detect positive forecast bias
Body: Create a new report which identifies SKUs that have a sustained positive bias - that is, the forecast has been two standard deviations higher than actual sales for 3 consecutive months.  This report should be limited to class C skus.

Title: Remove statistical bias from Class A SKus
Body: Cap the forecasts of class A SKUs to two positive (or negative) standard deviations if the SKU's forecast has 3 or more consecutive months of statistical bias

Title: Add API examples for demand overrides
Body: Update the API documentation with examples of how to override forecasted demand using PATCH /forecast/:id

Title: Need explanation
Body: Need an IT expert to explain the statistical safety stock calculations to the summer interns.
